appDescription.message: Streams synchronized translated speech for YouTube captions through a secure WebSocket backend.

popupSubtitle.message: The current YouTube video is detected automatically when translation is enabled.

optionsSubtitle.message: Secure backend configuration for synchronized YouTube audio translation.

aiDisclosure.message: Translated speech is AI-generated and sent through your configured backend.

storageUnavailableError.message: Chrome extension storage is unavailable in this context.

tokenRequiredError.message: Backend access token is required when automatic translation is enabled.

backendWssError.message: Backend URL must use wss:// or local ws://localhost.

notConfiguredStatus.message: Live translation is enabled but not configured. Open the extension popup.

metadataError.message: Could not read the current YouTube video metadata.

videoIdError.message: Could not identify the current YouTube video.

captionsUnavailableError.message: No caption track is available for the selected language.

captionsEmptyError.message: The selected caption track is empty.

adWaitingStatus.message: Waiting for the YouTube ad to finish before starting translation.

audioBlockedStatus.message: Click Enable audio once so Chrome can allow translated speech on this YouTube tab.

disabledStatus.message: Live Video Translation is ready. Open the extension, enter your token, enable translation, and save.

missingTokenError.message: Missing backend access token. Open the extension options and save a token.

backendUrlInvalidError.message: Backend URL must use wss:// or local ws://localhost and point to /stream
